mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patients (name, gender, age, id_card, phone, province, city, district, detailed_address, medical_history, allergy_history) VALUES ( #{name}, #{gender, typeHandler=com.iflytek.cn.medical_management.enums.handler.GenericEnumTypeHandler}, #{age, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{id_card}, #{phone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailed_address}, #{medical_history}, #{allergy_history})

INSERT INTO appointments (patient_id, doctor_id, appointment_date, appointment_time, appointment_datetime) VALUES ( #{patient_id}, #{doctor_id}, #{appointment_date}, #{appointment_time}, #{appointment_datetime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM doctors WHERE name LIKE #{query} OR title LIKE #{query}
SELECT p.name as patient_name, a.* FROM appointments a inner join patients p on a.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE a.doctor_id = #{doctor_id} ORDER BY a.appointment_datetime
